description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house with a complex, multi-hipped roof covered in dark gray shingles. The exterior features a combination of green siding and light gray foundation, with white trim accentuating the windows, railings, and columns. The front facade is distinguished by a covered entryway with two columns, a small balcony above, and a prominent bay window. On one side, there is a spacious attached garage with a flat roof and a sunroom or enclosed porch with large windows. The rear and side elevations show a mix of window sizes and arrangements, as well as a secondary balcony and additional entry points. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, with a focus on symmetry and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A large, two-story green house with a multi-hipped gray roof, white trim, covered entryway, balconies, and an attached garage with a sunroom.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with columns, balcony, bay window, and attached garage on the left.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting a simpler facade with three windows and the complex roof structure.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the secondary balcony, sunroom with large windows, and a side door.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, additional windows, and a fenced area adjacent to the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with bay and large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entry with two columns, steps, balcony above, and decorative white railings
